reviewReply.comment:

reviews.comment:
Tenian todos los combustibles, cola larga pero larga en baño de mujeres, 40 minutos para cargar a 6 coches. Recomiendo ir a la otra YPF

(Translated by Google)
They had all the fuels, but there was a really long line for the women's restroom; it took 40 minutes to fill up 6 cars. I recommend going to the other YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfMVlmQl93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención, falta de higiene y servicios accesorios. No la recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, lack of hygiene, and no additional amenities. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfeFlyODFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de Silvia. El servicompras muy limpio y ordenado, los chicos siempre están limpiando. Ojalá algún día se haga YPF FULL pero lo demás todo ok!

(Translated by Google)
Silvia provided excellent service. The convenience store was very clean and organized; the staff were always cleaning. I hope it becomes a YPF Full station someday, but everything else was great!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdVltejh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Rebien la confitería, pude hacer un Meet con BUE, muy cálida atención. Agregaron una caja para atender mas rápido. Super recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The confectionery shop was great; I was able to meet with BUE, and the service was very warm. They've added a checkout line for faster service. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente los playeros nuevos les molesta que seas socio del ACA y presentes la tarjeta. Comentarios fuera de lugar.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, new beachgoers are annoyed that you're an ACA member and present your card. Out-of-place comments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNNzctdUxBEAE

reviews.comment:
Super lleno, cola para el baño, para cargar y para comprar. Un solo empleado atendiendo,  vende, hace café,  cobra. Carguen nafta en Cutral co o tendrán que perder media hora para cargar ahí. Los que atienden hacen lo posible pero tienen poco personal y saben que es temporada alta

(Translated by Google)
Completely packed, lines for the bathroom, to refuel, and to buy things. Just one employee serving customers, selling, making coffee, and taking payments. Fill up in Cutral Co or you'll waste half an hour waiting there. The staff is doing their best, but they're short-staffed and know it's peak season.
